---
title: "Figure 3 – Cell type specific nigral changes"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(png)
library(grid)

load("results/CellType_Proportions.RData")
load("results/DEG_tables/DEG_results.RData")
load("results/pseudotime/OPC_ODCs_DTU_ps.RData")

pA <- ggplot(prop_df,
             aes(CellSubType, prop, fill=Disease)) +
      geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge") +
      ggtitle("A")
pA

# Replace path with real image
imgB <- rasterGrob(readPNG("figures/raw_images/AGTR1_puncta.png"))
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(imgB)

pC <- ggplot(coverage_df,
             aes(group, value)) +
      geom_boxplot() +
      ggtitle("C")
pC

imgD <- rasterGrob(readPNG("figures/raw_images/ODC_perineuronal.png"))
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(imgD)


deg_counts <- sapply(deg_results, function(df) {
  sum(df$p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(df$avg_log2FC) > 1, na.rm = TRUE)
})
mat <- matrix(deg_counts, nrow = 1)
colnames(mat) <- names(deg_counts)
rownames(mat) <- "DEG_count"

library(pheatmap)

pE <- pheatmap(
  mat,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  display_numbers = TRUE,
  main = "Number of DEGs (FDR < 0.05 & |logFC| > 1)"
)

pE


pF1 <- ggplot(meta_isoform_OPC_ODC2_CTR, aes(x=ps, fill=celltype)) +
    geom_density(alpha=.5) + theme_bw() +
      ggtitle("F")
pF1
pF2 <- ggplot(meta_isoform_OPC_ODC2_PD_B56, aes(x=ps, fill=celltype)) +
    geom_density(alpha=.5) + theme_bw() +
      ggtitle("F")
pF2

pG <- ggplot(risk_df,
             aes(interval, expression)) +
      geom_violin() +
      ggtitle("G")
pG
